4:T57a,(function(){var PARAM='__pd_reload';var KEY='privatedao-next-asset-recovery:'+(window.location.pathname||'/');function nextAsset(url){return typeof url==='string'&&url.indexOf('/_next/static/')!==-1;}function once(){try{if(window.sessionStorage.getItem(KEY)==='1'){return false;}window.sessionStorage.setItem(KEY,'1');return true;}catch(_){return true;}}function hardReload(){if(!once()){return;}var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.set(PARAM,String(Date.now()));window.location.replace(url.toString());}function maybeRecover(value){var message='';if(typeof value==='string'){message=value;}else if(value&&typeof value.message==='string'){message=value.message;}else if(value&&typeof value.reason==='string'){message=value.reason;}if(message.indexOf('ChunkLoadError')!==-1||message.indexOf('Loading CSS chunk')!==-1||message.indexOf('Failed to fetch dynamically imported module')!==-1){hardReload();}}window.addEventListener('error',function(event){var target=event.target;if(target&&nextAsset(target.src||target.href)){hardReload();}},true);window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection',function(event){maybeRecover(event.reason);});if(window.location.search.indexOf(PARAM+'=')!==-1){window.addEventListener('load',function(){var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.delete(PARAM);window.history.replaceState(window.history.state,'',url.toString());},{once:true});}})();0:{"P":null,"c":["","viewer","anchor-toolchain-status-2026-04-30",""],"q":"","i":false,"f":[[["",{"children":["viewer",{"children":[["slug","anchor-toolchain-status-2026-04-30","c",null],{"children":["__PAGE__",{}]}]}]},"$undefined","$undefined",16],[["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","link","0",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/02zo295tzj_7w.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","link","1",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/16f3b3rhk3fwn.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0og9v~0.wbgel.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0c3rgjc-0fe3r.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0f6kvf~_~fcr7.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/01v-109x2_k5o.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0i.l9589uvx0j.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-5",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0iywei4pzeiss.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-6",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/10_9opwzz0v93.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-7",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0j4pbljnny6-v.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}]],["$","html",null,{"lang":"en","className":"space_grotesk_d7b50fc5-module__qeW00a__variable sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-46-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"AVM-managed Anchor CLI: `anchor-cli 1.0.1`"}],["$","li","l-46-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Solana CLI: 21:["$","code",null,{"children":"export PATH=\"$HOME/.avm/bin:$PATH\"\nanchor --version\nanchor build"}]
22:["$","$1","block-13",{"children":["$","h2","h2-58",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Migration Fixes Applied"}]}]
23:["$","$1","block-14",{"children":["$","ul","l-68",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-68-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Updated Anchor Rust crates to `1.0.1`."}],["$","li","l-68-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Updated CPI construction for Anchor 1, where `CpiContext::new` and `CpiContext::new_with_signer` expect a program `Pubkey`."}],["$","li","l-68-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Updated the test helper `AccountInfo::new` call shape for the current Solana SDK."}],["$","li","l-68-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Regenerated the program ID through `anchor keys sync`."}],["$","li","l-68-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Rebuilt the program and IDL successfully with `anchor build`."}],["$","li","l-68-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Deployed the upgraded program to Testnet with Solana CLI QUIC transport."}]]}]}]
24:["$","$1","block-15",{"children":["$","h2","h2-71",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Remaining Hardening"}]}]
25:["$","$1","block-16",{"children":["$","ul","l-79",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-79-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Anchor macros still emit upstream `unexpected cfg` warnings for `custom-heap`, `custom-panic`, and `anchor-debug`."}],["$","li","l-79-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Several account structs still use deprecated `AccountInfo`; migrate them to `UncheckedAccount` in a follow-up hardening pass."}],["$","li","l-79-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"The workspace has pre-existing web TypeScript alias/generated-file issues and lint findings unrelated to the Anchor 1 migration."}],["$","li","l-79-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Full test suite timing changed under the upgraded toolchain; several long-running live-style tests need timeout/duration tuning before claiming a clean full-suite pass."}]]}]}]
